maps.title: MAP: Be Companies Auditor's Report (Reserve
maps.objective: To ensure be called non-banking financial companies auditor's report (reserve bank) directions, 2016

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Be Companies Auditor's Report (Reserve
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be Companies Auditor's Report (Reserve'. Document the existing Reporting posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: a) These Directions shall be called Non-Banking Financial Companies Auditor's
Report (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2016.

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Be Companies Auditor's Report (Reserve
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Be Companies Auditor's Report (Reserve'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Prepare and submit regulatory report: Be Companies Auditor's Report (Reserve
tasks.description: Prepare the regulatory report required under 'Be Companies Auditor's Report (Reserve'. Ensure the report format complies with RBI prescribed templates (XBRL, CIMS, or prescribed return format as applicable). Have the report reviewed and signed by the authorised signatory before submission. Retain a copy of the submitted report and the submission acknowledgement receipt.
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed submission copy and RBI/regulator acknowledgement receipt
tasks.implementation_notes: Late submission attracts regulatory penalty. Set submission reminder 7 days before deadline.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Companies Auditor's Report (Reserve
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Companies Auditor's Report (Reserve'. Required evidence types: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be Companies Auditor's Report
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be Companies Auditor's Report (Reserve'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

maps.title: MAP: Come immediate effect
maps.objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Come immediate effect
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Come immediate effect'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes: Review control description: b) These directions shall come into force with immediate effect.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Come immediate effect
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Come immediate effect
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Come immediate effect'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Come immediate effect
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Come immediate effect' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Come immediate effect
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Come immediate effect'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
